governing_requirement: Publish and clean-install one versioned MaskFactory integration release whose source and installed node, workflow, schema, API/OpenAPI and hash inventories match exactly, reject stale node-pack bytes and consume no dirty source authority.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-12.01 remains dependency and implementation blocked. Exact developer node/workflow copy receives limited credit; no integration release may be published from the dirty development tree.

verified_foundations: A temporary isolated install copies exactly eight source node/workflow files with identical relative paths and SHA-256 values, excluding the generated local config.
The node installer enforces the loopback API URL and writes a deterministic local configuration.
Existing release-bundle validation rejects unmanifested files inside a supplied byte-closed release root.
Two focused installer/release-byte-closure tests pass and Ruff reports no issues on governing installer and bridge test files.

direct_probes.procedure: Seed stale_unpublished_node.py in the temporary target, then reinstall.

direct_probes.dirty_scope_disposition: Preserved MF-P6-08.05 changes are valid quarantine material but cannot serve as production release bytes.

confirmed_gaps: No versioned integration release artifact binds exact source Git/tree, wheel, node pack, workflows, schemas, generated API/OpenAPI, policies, inventories and hashes.
No clean-build publisher consumes the accepted MF-P6-10.01 publication decision, MF-P6-10.02 capability decision and MF-P6-10.04 installation transaction.
The developer installer consumes imported working-tree bytes and cannot exclude preserved uncommitted changes as production authority.
No installed manifest closes the node/workflow/schema/OpenAPI inventory or compares it to the source release catalog.
Merge-in-place installation preserves stale files, so the required stale-node-pack negative test fails.
No installed release receipt binds exact service/API/OpenAPI identity, node inventory, active pointer, previous release, rollback evidence and verification time.
MF-P6-11.08 has no exact installed node-pack drift detector or atomic receipt-last recovery transaction.

implementation_packet.objective: Implement additive integration-release assembly and clean-install acceptance over adopted 10.01/10.02/10.04 and 11.08 evidence without changing frozen v1 contracts or consuming mutable source paths.
implementation_packet.path_state: All five additive paths are absent and clean. They are disjoint from frozen v1 contracts, prepared MF-P6-10.04 paths and preserved MF-P6-08.05 changes.
acceptance_criteria: Consume only exact adopted upstream publication, capability, installation and recovery evidence; any missing, stale or mismatched prerequisite denies publication.
Assemble from clean immutable release bytes and bind Git/tree, wheel, node, workflow, schema, API/OpenAPI, policy, inventory and rollback hashes in a strict signed evidence record.
Install into a new contained target, verify exact byte closure, atomically activate receipt-last, and prove source/installed inventories are exactly equal.
Reject every extra, missing, changed, stale, case-colliding, link-like or path-escaping installed file before adoption.
Negative tests prove dirty/editable source refusal, stale node rejection, OpenAPI/schema drift rejection and exact rollback to the prior verified release.
implementation_packet.next_action: Hold until MF-P6-10.04 and MF-P6-11.08 are implemented/adopted and exact-project worker routing is qualified; do not dispatch or duplicate while worker lanes remain disabled.

claim_boundary: This audit credits only exact isolated copying of the eight dependency-light node/workflow files. It does not publish or clean-install a versioned integration release, prove schema/API/OpenAPI parity, reject stale nodes, consume immutable clean source, complete either prerequisite, or complete MF-P6-12.01.
